titleStmt.title: SII 25.52: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 52. (A.R. No. 52 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
This record may be assigned on c. pelaeographical grounds to 13th Century.

It refers to an order (nirupam) issued to the tāṉattār of Vaḻugūr in Chaḷukkippaṟṟu by the Gāṅgayar to meet the expenses of worship and services to the debty Tiruv-ayaṉīśuram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār from out of the income from the sarvamānya-iṟaiyili lands granted in the same village. Also it mentions that the worship was not conducted properly and this necessitated Gāṅgayar to purchase the lands as tirunāmattukkāṇi and assign it to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kṣaya varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 22 ḷa śrīmatu caḷukkiThe intended word may be caḷukkippaṟṟu vaḻukūrt tāṉattāṟku
nirupam taṅkaḷūr poṉṉi Ental Iṉṉāḷvaraiyum Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvayaṉi curamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉāṟkut tirup
paṇipūcai pātiāy naṭaikkaiyil Ivvūr kāṅkayar nammuṭaiya Ūril paṭṭiṟaikku Inta poṉṉi Ē
tiṟappākiyum tāṅkalum kiḻainattameṭum vilaiyāka viṟkaiyil kāṅkayar tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyāka koṇṭu cātanam paṇṇikkoḷḷukai yil Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku pūcai tiruppaṇikku mu
tal Illātapaṭiyāle Ivar viṟṟa cātanappaṭi Intap poṉṉi Ēntalum tāṅkalum kiḻai nattameṭum Ivai Aṭaṅ
kalum sarvvamānnya Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭutta Aḷavukku Itukku veṇṭum kuṭiyum Eṟṟi veṇṭum payirum payiṟcey
tu koṇṭu Iṉṉilam cantrātittavaraiyum naṭattik koḷḷavum In Kannada characters. śiThis stands for an auspicious term ‘śivam’Inta dharmmam Iṟakku
vāṉ gaṅkai karaiyil pacuvaik koṉṟāṉ pāvam koḷḷuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 25.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
